// distributed-firewall/types.ts
import { FirewallPolicy, FirewallRule } from './types';
import { mockPoliciesData } from './mock-data';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-distributed-firewall-old',
  templateUrl: './distributed-firewall-old.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./distributed-firewall-old.component.css']
})
export class DistributedFirewallOldComponent {
  // Define signals
  policies = signal<FirewallPolicy[]>(mockPoliciesData);
  searchTerm = signal('');

  //  Helper Method
  getDisplayItems(value: string): string[] {
    return value.split(',').map(item => item.trim());
  }

  isIpAddress(value: string): boolean {
    const ipRegex = /^(?:[0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}$/;
    return ipRegex.test(value);
  }

  // search logic
  filteredPolicies = computed(() => {
    const term = this.searchTerm().toLowerCase();
    if (!term) return this.policies();
    return this.policies().filter(p => p.name.toLowerCase().includes(term));
  });

  // Action methods
  handleAddPolicyClick() {
    // Implement the modal open logic here, for example:
    console.log('Add Policy button clicked');
    // Open a modal to add a new policy
  }

  // Toggle policy
  togglePolicy(policyId: string) {
    this.policies.update(policies =>
      policies.map(policy =>
        policy.id === policyId ? { ...policy, isExpanded: !policy.isExpanded } : policy
      )
    );
  }
}
